results.rendered_html: kauśāmbī f. (g. nady-ādi), N. of an ancient city (now represented by the village of Kosam, on the Jumnā, near Allahābād; also called vatsa-pattana),  R. i, 34, 6 ;  Divyāv. xxxvi f. ;  Pāṇ. iv, 2, 68 ,  Kāś. ;  Kathās. iv, 18 ; ix, 5
